name: Cohere North

form_factor.comment: Enterprise AI agent studio/workspace with UI and API-based workflows. Not a repo-native coding agent. Per-form-factor links: Web: https://cohere.com/north; SDK: https://cohere.com/north/agent-studio.

latest_major_update.comment: Command A+ model update powers agentic workflows and coding benchmarks, while North remains the enterprise agent platform.

rules.comment: North supports enterprise guardrails, but not repo-local instruction files. Location: hosted/web/API-managed; no local disk folder documented.

skills.comment: No-code custom agents and reusable workflows, not code-agent SKILL.md folders. Location: hosted/web/API-managed; no local disk folder documented.

hooks.comment: Multi-step workflow automations are a core Agent Studio feature.

mcp_servers.comment: Agent Studio explicitly mentions MCP integration. Location: hosted/web/API-managed; no local disk folder documented.

custom_commands.comment: No coding-agent slash-command surface found. Location: hosted/web/API-managed; no local disk folder documented.

goal_command.comment: North is a hosted agent studio with automations/goals in the product sense, not a terminal `/goal` slash command.

subagents.comment: Agent-to-agent coordination is listed as an extensibility feature.

model_selection.comment: Cohere model stack is selected through North/Cohere platform, not arbitrary coding-agent CLI flags.

approval_mode.comment: Enterprise guardrails and human-agent collaboration; no per-shell-command approval model.

sandbox_mode.comment: Private deployment options include VPC, on-prem, or Cohere Model Vault.

resume.comment: North has memory-oriented agent workflows, but no coding-session resume command.

continue.comment: Memory supports cross-session workflows in North; not a CLI continue feature.

non_interactive.comment: API-based workflows can automate tasks, but not local repo headless coding.

output_format.comment: Cohere APIs return structured responses; North UI outputs are workflow-specific.

statusline.comment: Enterprise web workspace, no CLI statusline.

telemetry.comment: Audit-ready logs and traceability are documented; telemetry opt-out details are not.

hosted_agent.comment: North is an enterprise agent platform/workspace.

custom_model_provider.comment: Built around Cohere models/platform deployment, not arbitrary model providers.

pricing.comment: North is sold through demo/sales motion.

notes: Included because the request mentioned Cohere. This is an enterprise agent platform with coding-capable Command A+ underneath, not a direct Claude Code/Codex-style coding agent.

transcripts.comment: Location: hosted/web/API-managed session history; no local transcript directory documented.

keyboard_shortcuts.comment: Research needed. Check official documentation for keybinding customization options.

theme_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for theme/appearance customization options.

auto_save.comment: Research needed. Check for auto-save or session persistence features.

debugging_output.comment: Research needed. Check for debug mode or verbose logging options.

context_window.comment: Research needed. Check for configurable context length or token limits.

code_formatting.comment: Research needed. Check for formatter/linter integration or auto-format options.

git_integration.comment: Research needed. Check for git command support or version control integration.

performance_mode.comment: Research needed. Check for caching, optimization, or resource management settings.

ui_customization.comment: Research needed. Check for UI layout, sidebar, or panel customization.
